Package minicp.examples

Class EBRP.EBRPInstance

java.lang.Object
minicp.examples.EBRP.EBRPInstance
Enclosing class:
EBRP
public static class EBRP.EBRPInstance extends Object
An EBRP instance, with its distance matrix and time windows EBRP.TimeWindow

  • Constructor Details

    • EBRPInstance

      public EBRPInstance(int nNodes, int[][] distances, EBRP.TimeWindow[] tw)
      An EBRP instance
      Parameters:
      nNodes - number of nodes in the instance
      distances - distance between nodes
      tw - time windows of each node

  • Method Details

    • fromFile

      public static EBRP.EBRPInstance fromFile(String filePath)
      create an instance from a file
      Parameters:
      filePath - file where the instance is written
      Returns:
      instance related to the file

    • cost

      public int cost(int[] ordering)
      gives the cost associated to a visit ordering
      Parameters:
      ordering - order of visit for the nodes. First node == 0 == begin depot
      Returns:
      routing cost associated with the visit of the nodes

    • distance

      public int distance(int from, int to)
      give the distance between two nodes
      Parameters:
      from - origin node
      to - destination node
      Returns:
      distance to travel from node "from" until node "to"

      public String toString()
